mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, COUNT(*) AS totalSessions, COALESCE(SUM(completed_sets), 0) AS totalSets, COALESCE(SUM(total_reps), 0) AS totalReps, COALESCE(SUM(duration_minutes), 0) AS totalDurationMin, COALESCE(MAX(total_volume_kg), 0) AS peakVolumeKg, MAX(session_time) AS latestTrainingTime FROM interv_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND del_flag = '0' GROUP BY user_id

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN session_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS sessionsLast7Days, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN session_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS sessionsLast30Days, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN session_date = CURDATE() THEN completed_sets ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completedSetsToday, COALESCE(( SELECT latest.exercise_type FROM interv_session latest WHERE latest.user_id = #{userId} AND latest.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND latest.del_flag = '0' AND latest.session_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY) AND latest.exercise_type IS NOT NULL AND latest.exercise_type != '' ORDER BY latest.session_time DESC, latest.session_id DESC LIMIT 1 ), 'strength_station') AS deviceType FROM interv_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND del_flag = '0'
